summary: Testing of Assign Assessment and Share Resource functionality. Backend APIs 100% working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend code review verified - all handlers and dialogs are properly implemented. Frontend UI testing blocked by browser crashes (known issue from iterations 42-44).

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes when navigating to client profile page - cannot complete frontend UI testing
integration_issues.notes: Known issue from iterations 42-44. Browser consistently crashes on therapist dashboard and client profile pages.

action_items: BLOCKER: Investigate and fix browser crash issue on therapist dashboard and client profile pages before further frontend testing can proceed
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED (Line 314-324): openAssignAssessmentDialog() correctly fetches assessment library from GET /api/assessments/library and opens dialog
VERIFIED (Line 327-341): handleAssignAssessment() correctly calls POST /api/assessments with {client_id, assessment_type, notes}
VERIFIED (Line 344-354): openShareResourceDialog() correctly fetches resources from GET /api/resources and opens dialog
VERIFIED (Line 985): Assessments section has Assign button with onClick={openAssignAssessmentDialog} and data-testid='assign-assessment-btn'
VERIFIED (Line 1027): Resources section has Share button with onClick={openShareResourceDialog} and data-testid='share-resource-btn'
VERIFIED (Lines 1588-1635): Assign Assessment Dialog properly implemented with assessment type dropdown (data-testid='assessment-type-select')
VERIFIED (Lines 1638-1688): Share Resource Dialog properly implemented with resource dropdown (data-testid='resource-select')
VERIFIED: Both dialogs have confirm buttons with proper data-testid attributes ('confirm-assign-assessment', 'confirm-share-resource')

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test - browser crashes on client profile page

seed_data_creation: Test assessments and resource assignments created during testing are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Assign Assessment (POST /api/assessments) and Share Resource (POST /api/resources/{id}/assign) are fully working. Frontend code review verified all handlers and dialogs are correctly implemented. Browser crashes on therapist dashboard and client profile pages prevent UI testing - this is a known issue from iterations 42-44. Next testing agent should focus on resolving the browser crash issue first, then test the UI buttons and dialogs.

POST /api/assessments (assign assessment.notes: Successfully assigns PHQ-9, GAD-7 assessments to client

GET /api/assessments/library.notes: Returns PHQ-9, GAD-7, BDI-II and other assessment types

Frontend - Assign Assessment Button.notes: onClick handler correctly wired to openAssignAssessmentDialog

Frontend - Share Resource Button.notes: onClick handler correctly wired to openShareResourceDialog

Frontend - Assign Assessment Dialog.notes: Dialog with dropdown and confirm button implemented

Frontend - Share Resource Dialog.notes: Dialog with dropdown and confirm button implemented
